# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-07-15

Cloudflare added EDE 33 so resolvers can explicitly signal when a Negative Trust Anchor bypassed DNSSEC validation.

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. A broken DNSSEC rollover took down .AL. Now 1.1.1.1 tells you when validation is bypassed
   Real operational lesson from a live TLD outage, plus a standards change that improves resolver transparency.

2. Vercel Blob now supports consistent reads on private storage
   Useful fix for agent memory, scheduled reports, and overwrite-heavy workflows that need correctness.

3. Node.js 20 is being deprecated on October 1, 2026
   Clear deadline that can break future deploys on a common platform.

4. Access and share AI Gateway leaderboard data
   Gives builders a reusable production-usage dataset instead of anecdotal model chatter.

5. 5 Trends That Defined AI Engineering at World’s Fair 2026
   Conference synthesis, not breaking news, but it matches where agent tooling work is heading.
